feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SF Learning reports restrict remote option
entry.content:
In SF Learning Reports, I am scheduling the User Item Status report to write the file to our SFTP server (using the "remote" option).   Is there a way to restrict other administrators from using the remote option in SF Learning reports (via security?)?  I don't want someone to run the report with a different selection criteria and write to the SFTP server. 

The only other option I can think of is creating a custom report that is a copy of the delivered report and restrict access to the new report (and update REPORT_SYSTEM config).

entry.title: SAP GTS
entry.content:
HI ALL,

There 2 legal regulations for those having same material/products. and same general settings configurations. even 1 legal regulation triggered and 1 legal regulation is not. why?

entry.title: Auto populate second manager in job relationship
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Need your help to give advice. We have requirement to populate second level manager in job relationship but we would like to have it auto populate instead of user input. Any input how to achieve this? We have position management enabled also.

Thank you,
Regards,

Vonny

entry.title: User ID generation in Onboarding with external ATS
entry.content:
Our landscape consists of: External ATS -> SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 -> SuccessFactors Employee Central.

Within this setup, we are unable to create a rule that enforces the generation of Person ID and User ID following the Employee Central Sequence (it seems that This business rule is honored only when the new hire is onboarded from SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting).

Has anyone found a potential workaround?

entry.title: How to populate the data from HRIS portlet to MDF portlet
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I need to populate the cost center as and when created in Job Information (HRIS) with date in Alternative Cost Distribution Portlet (MDF) with date. 

 

Thanks & Regards, 

Ashwani Gupta

entry.title: How PRod / Preview datacenter can have a feature down at the same time ?
entry.content:
We are experiencing severe feature down  in DC33 data center :

- in prod

- in preview

HR are unable to :

- terminate

- rehire

- update job/comp info

i would like to understand how it’s technically feasible that a change does impact both data centers at the same time .

is there some specific emergency changes that can be deployed in both datacenters at the same time ?

how can we find the latest change done from these category ?

entry.title: Test
entry.content: Test

entry.title: National ID Passport Field
entry.content:
Hi,

Our current requirement is that if a user does not have nationality details for a specific country, they must add their passport details in the National ID portlet. However, I noticed that during the EC implementation, the default configuration was applied, and passport information is missing for many countries. I am considering manually creating a passport field for all countries in BCUI, but I am unsure about the Display Format and Regular Expression for each country. I created a support ticket for assistance, but they mentioned there is no KBA available that lists the passport Display Format and Regular Expression for all countries, and they recommended submitting an enhancement request. Can anyone provide suggestions on this?

entry.title: Implementing Position Management After Implementing Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi SuccessFactors Network,
I’m curious if any SuccessFactors customers initially implemented Employee Central without Position Management and have recently transitioned to Position Management. If so, I’d love to hear about your experience and any key insights you can share.

Thanks in Advance!!

entry.title: 2h 2024 release document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Could you please confirm if the release Document is updated in whats new viewer’s for 2H 2024. As, I can see that the product release page is still showing 1h available and in What's new viewer it is showing 334 features.

 

 

Regards,

Vijaya

entry.title: Partial pages of successfactors are missing
entry.content:
When I login the SFS system, clicking on the report center will bring me to an empty screen.

When I search for import employee data, I still get an empty screen.

When I enter a form, all the tools at the top of the form disappear.

Please refer to the attachment for details.

The other images currently appear normal.

This is a problem that has only occurred in recent days and has not been resolved. Do any experts know the reason？

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Learning System options for practice
entry.content:
Hello, I recently started my SAP Learning with a focus on SuccessFactors.  I am currently on the "Exploring the SAP SuccessFactors Platform" learning content and I have to complete some exercises, but I am not sure which Learning System I should Enroll into. Anyone has any suggestions about this?

Any help is appreciated!

Kind regards

entry.title: Document Generation WF template in a future dated Pay components change WF
entry.content:
Hey Guru's,

I have configured the Document generation WF templates for some of the WFs in the system. When I try to use a business rule to fetch Pay component amount/ frequency the output is blank if the effective date of the change is in the future. I have tried to change the field type to be string or number but no output is given if the change is in the future. Anyone has an idea how to fix this?

 

Output: Effective Date in the future

 

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: Termination action - manager redirection
entry.content:
Hello all,

Can anyone help me to configure this?

When a manager is terminated and he has direct reports, SF is stating that there is no event reason.

If termination is done for a normal employee (with no direct reports) it works fine.

entry.title: How can external LMS users access the system if you have not migrated to IAS?
entry.content:
Hello, we will not be able to complete the IAS migration in time for the 2H 2024 release, which means our External LMS users who currently login with the Native Learning Sign in will no longer be able to access the LMS. Does anyone have a workaround we can use until we've completed the IAS migration?

https://community.sap.com/t5/product-and-customer-updates/learning-integrated-external-user-migration-to-identity-authentication/ba-p/146684

Thank you, Jennifer

entry.title: How to we manage hiring temporary or contract new hire on right to return permanent position
entry.content:
Hi .

Business wants to hire temporary or contract employee on RTR permanent position . Position number will remain same but new hired employee will work as temp or contract nature. Higher duty wont work in our case.

They do not want to create temporary position.

entry.title: Where do I get the Course Files (zip file) for practice on the system (HandsOn THR81)?
entry.content:
Hi! I´m doing the EXERCISES of THR81, and I need the to download the Course Files (included in the assigned course content in the Learning Hub) but I didn´t find it.  How can I get it?

Thanks

entry.title: How to prorate Accrual Leave - Annual Leave based on employee's hire date?
entry.content:
Our customer wants to prorate Accrual Leave - Annual Leave based on employee's hire date.

For example, if an employee's hire date is 2021-06-10, for the next year (2022), the employee's Accrual Leave will be prorated and since 2023, it will be granted as 15 and so on.

So for 2022, the value for accounting post will be 9 even though workdays (205 days) / 365 days * 15 = 8.4 since it should be Round Up.

And For workers who have worked continuously for more than 3 years, 1 day is added for every 2 years of continuous employment exceeding at least 1 year.

Up to 25 days can be added.

Could you please provide me any advice or referable documents or let me know how to configure this business rule in SF?

Referable screenshot would be appreciated and please refer the attached screenshot for the details.

Thank you.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: Report on candidates hired through SF onboarding
entry.content:
Hello All

Is there any way we can get a report for the number of candidates hired through SF onboarding. I was thinking of getting the hiring template name used for hiring (as we have separate hiring template for candidates we are hiring through SF onboarding) but found a KBA 3364387 that its not possible

Please guide is there any other way (Story Report, Integration center etc) and which exact table and column is storing this information

Thanks

entry.title: How to add Group Rule field User -> User Group table in Story Schema
entry.content: Hi. Is it possible to add Users Group Rule field to User Group table in Story Report? In ORD report this field is reportable along with Users Group ID and Users Group Name in User Users Group table and returns XML code of the report definition. Thank you.
